message:
🌱 Add woodpecker-ci: Add support for nonroot OCI images mission (#1700)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "woodpecker-ci-1077-add-support-for-nonroot-oci-images",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "woodpecker-ci: Add support for nonroot OCI images",
+    "description": "Add support for nonroot OCI images. Requested by 18+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current woodpecker-ci deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your woodpecker-ci version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci\nhelm list -n woodpecker-ci 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working woodpecker-ci installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review woodpecker-ci configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant woodpecker-ci configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci\nkubectl get configmap -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=woodpecker-ci\n```\n### Clear and concise description of the problem\n\nI want to build my software using pipelines that use nonroot images, as my builds do not require root."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for nonroot OCI images",
+        "description": "Setting `workingDir` to `workspaceBase`, i.e. `/woodpecker`, and creating `<workspaceBase>/src/<repo slug>` via the container user solves this. The subsequently created dir is then owned by the container user and all operations work.\nTo achieve this, `workspaceBase` has been added to the `Step`\n```yaml\nrun-as: [uid]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci\nkubectl get events -n woodpecker-ci --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for nonroot OCI images\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Setting `workingDir` to `workspaceBase`, i.e. `/woodpecker`, and creating `<workspaceBase>/src/<repo slug>` via the container user solves this. The subsequently created dir is then owned by the container user and all operations work.\nTo achieve this, `workspaceBase` has been added to the `Step` struct and set as `workingDir` during pod creation.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "run-as: [uid]",
+        "when:\n  event:\n    - push\n\nskip_clone: true\n\nsteps:\n  test:\n    image: renovate/renovate\n    commands:\n      - whoami\n      - pwd\n      - echo $HOME\n      - ls -la /woodpecker\n      - echo $CI_WORKSPACE\n      - ls -la $CI_WORKSPACE\n      - mkdir /woodpecker/test\n      - ls -la /woodpecker/test",
+        "+ whoami\nubuntu\n+ pwd\n/woodpecker/src/<redacted>/$CI_REPO\n+ echo $HOME\n/home/ubuntu\n+ ls -la /woodpecker\ntotal 24\ndrwxrwsr-x. 4 root   ubuntu  4096 Oct  2 08:31 .\ndrwxr-xr-x. 1 root   root      26 Oct  2 08:31 ..\ndrwxrws---. 2 root   ubuntu 16384 Oct  2 08:31 lost+found\ndrwxr-sr-x. 3 ubuntu ubuntu  4096 Oct  2 08:31 src\n+ echo $CI_WORKSPACE\n/woodpecker/src/<redacted>/$CI_REPO\n+ ls -la $CI_WORKSPACE\ntotal 8\ndrwxr-sr-x. 2 ubuntu ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 .\ndrwxr-sr-x. 3 ubuntu ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 ..\n+ mkdir /woodpecker/test\n+ ls -la /woodpecker/test\ntotal 8\ndrwxr-sr-x. 2 ubuntu ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 .\ndrwxrwsr-x. 5 root   ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 .."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "woodpecker-ci",
+      "community",
+      "ci-cd",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "woodpecker-ci"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/issues/1077",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/4151"
+    },
+    "reactions": 18,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with woodpecker-ci installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },

+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-23T06:59:11.304Z",
